subcodes.first_line: The Book hath verily been inscribed by the Most Exalted Pen as it moveth betwixt the fingers of God, the Almighty, the All-Powerful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد رقم الکتاب من القلم الاعلی اذ کان یتحرک بین اصبعی الله المقتدر القدیر و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @knowledge; recognition of God
